name: Map Transient Artifacts via Z-Projection
description: AstroImageJ is running. Using the 30-frame time-series sequence in '~/AstroImages/time_series/', extract transient artifacts by creating an artifact map. Save a Maximum Intensity Z-Projection to '~/AstroImages/artifacts/max_projection.fits' and a Median Z-Projection to '~/AstroImages/artifacts/median_projection.fits'. Generate the artifact map by subtracting the median projection from the maximum projection and save the result to '~/AstroImages/artifacts/artifact_map.fits'. Measure the peak intensity of the artifact map and record it in '~/AstroImages/artifacts/artifact_stats.txt' using the exact line: 'Peak artifact intensity: <value>'.
